notes: v1.14.107 - Premium icon system (Phosphor fine-line + sprite), phase 1. Installed one hidden <svg id=ph-sprite> of 13 <symbol>s (right after <body>); swapped the 10 card-grid icons (Work: deploy/scan/handoff/issues; Ref: optics/hardware/cli/hwref/know/compass) + the 3 bottom-nav icons (command/work/ref) from ad-hoc inline SVG to <use href=#ph-x> references - one source of truth. Two-tier glow: calmer resting glow on card icons (5px/40%); nav resting glow + bright ACTIVE glow on the current mode; subtle glow on the active drill-in sub-tab. OODA fixes vs handoff: (a) Phosphor symbols are fill-based (paths have no fill -> would render black), so set fill:currentColor;stroke:none on .rf-card .rf-cic svg AND #rd-botnav .botitem svg (the nav CSS previously forced fill:none;stroke); (b) Compass card anchor is ref_openCompass() not the handoff's rf-compass. Markup+CSS only, all body.rd-gated; legacy 5-tab markup + .qa-btn untouched. Phase 2 (header/ghost/inline icon families) deferred per handoff.
